title: Permission for guest to add or edit a form
excerpt: When creating forms for a client it is usually very collaborative from both teams. It would be great if the system had a permission to allow a guest to edit or add a form.

posts.author: awoods269 (AmyWoods)
posts.cookedHtml: When creating forms for a client it is usually very collaborative from both teams. It would be great if the system had a permission to allow a guest to edit or add a form.
